# Google Sheets Connector - Full Documentation

# Google Sheets Connector 1.1 - Examples

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

The following examples show how to use Anypoint Connector for Google Sheets (Google Sheets
Connector) to create a row in an existing spreadsheet.

## Before You Begin

You must have:

- Access to Google Sheets
- OAuth username and password

## Configure HTTP Listener

Configure **HTTP Listener** to initiate a Mule flow when a call is made to the `/` account path on
localhost, port 8081.

This example uses variables for some field values. You can either:

- Replace the variables with their values in the code.
- Provide the values for each variable in a properties file and then refer to that file from the
  connector configuration.

If you donât know how to use a properties file, see
[Configuring Property Placeholders](../../mule-runtime/latest/mule-app-properties-to-configure).

To configure **HTTP Listener**:

1.  Create a new Mule project in Studio.
2.  In the **Mule Palette** view, search for `http` and select the **Listener** operation:
3.  Drag the **Listener** operation onto the canvas.
4.  In the **Listener** configuration, click **+** next to the **Connector configuration** field to
    add a global element.
5.  Click **OK** to accept the defaults.
6.  Set the **Path** field to `/`:

## Add and Configure the Append Spreadsheets Values Operation

1.  In the **Mule Palette** view, search for `Google Sheets` and select the **Append Spreadsheets
    Values** operation.
2.  Drag the **Append Spreadsheets Values** operation onto the canvas, to the right of the **HTTP
    Listener** component.
3.  In the **Append Spreadsheets Values** configuration, click **+** next to the **Connector
    configuration** field to add a global element.
4.  Configure the global element as follows:
    - **Configuration Name**: `Google_Sheets_Connector_Mule4Connector_Config`
    - **Consumer key**: `${config.consumerKey}`
    - **Consumer secret**: `${config.consumerSecret}`
    - **Authorization url**: Leave the default
    - **Access token url**: Leave the default
    - **Callback path**: `${config.callbackPath}`
    - **Authorize path**: `${config.authorizePath}`

5.  Click **Test Connection** to ensure your username, password, and tenant name are correct.
6.  Click **OK**.

## Configure required parameters of the Append Spreadsheets Values Operation

1.  Click the **Append Spreadsheets Values** component.
2.  In the configuration panel of the component, enter your own values for the following parameters,
    for example:
    - **Spreadsheet id**: `19y7nVZPQz3NQSTSGfCh06KXPIqGV2YXohTupmynJyZ5`
    - **range**: `Sheet1!A1`

3.  Click **OK**.

## Add a Logger Component to Display the Response in the Mule Console

1.  In the **Mule Palette** view, search for `logger` and select **Logger (Core)**.
2.  Drag the **Logger** component onto the canvas, to the right of the **Append Spreadsheets
    Values** component.
3.  Configure the following fields:

    <table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Value</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Display Name</strong></p></td><td><p>Enter <code>Log Response</code>.</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Message</strong></p></td><td><p>Enter <code>`#[payload]`</code>.</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Level</strong></p></td><td><p>Leave the default, <code>INFO</code>.</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

4.  Create a property file named `mule-artifact.properties` in `src/main/resources` with the
    properties used in this example:
    - `config.consumerKey`
    - `config.consumerSecret`
    - `config.callbackPath`
    - `config.authorizePath`

5.  Save the project.
6.  Test the app by sending a request to `/` on port 8081.
7.  You will receive a JSON response similar to this one:

```xml
{
    "spreadsheetId": "19y7nVZPQz3NQSTSGfCh06KXPIqGV2YXohTupmynJyZ5",
    "tableRange": "Demo!A1:C38",
    "updates": {
        "spreadsheetId": "19y7nVZPQz3NQSTSGfCh06KXPIqGV2YXohTupmynJyZ5",
        "updatedRange": "Demo!A39"
    }
}
```

## Append Spreadsheets Values in a Spreadsheet Example

Paste this code into the Studio XML editor to quickly load the flow for this example into your Mule
app:

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:google-sheets="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/google-sheets" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
	xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/google-sheets http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/google-sheets/current/mule-google-sheets.xsd">
	<http:listener-config name="HTTP_Listener_config" doc:name="HTTP Listener config" doc:id="a841f003-9ac4-43bc-8751-10dd557b66d6" >
		<http:listener-connection host="127.0.0.1" port="8081" />
	</http:listener-config>

	<configuration-properties doc:name="Configuration properties" doc:id="7d6911bb-52b4-4d90-8724-62cfe239686a" file="mule-artifact.properties" />

    <flow name="demoFlow" doc:id="481ac26c-b66b-4f9d-b91f-4995ea8ff6a6" >
		<http:listener doc:name="Listener" doc:id="49be04b5-efec-4db6-8c49-d13475533be0" config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="/"/>
		<google-sheets:create-spreadsheets-values-rangeappend-by-spreadsheet-id doc:name="Append Spreadsheets Values" doc:id="2618426a-cca7-41f0-87b2-90ea85045af2" config-ref="Google_Sheets_Connector_Mule4Connector_Config" spreadsheetId="19y7nVZPQz3NQSTSGfCh06KXPIqGV2YXohTupmynJyZ5" range="Demo"/>
		<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="9f7181ff-a7ad-4b0c-8300-07b8bd847672" />
	</flow>
</mule>
```

## See Also

- [Introduction to Anypoint Connectors](../../connectors/introduction/introduction-to-anypoint-connectors)
- [Salesforce Help](https://help.salesforce.com)
---

# Google Sheets Connector 1.1 Reference

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Anypoint Connector for Google Sheets (Google Sheets Connector) enables you to interface with the
Google Sheets platform without having to interact with the Google Sheets API directly.

## Configurations

---

### Config

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name for this configuration. Connectors reference the configuration with this name.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Config_Oauth20">Oauth 2 0 Connection Provider</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>The connection types to provide to this configuration.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td><p>1</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout</p></td><td><p>MINUTES</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO automatically defines the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td><p>AUTO</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expiration Policy</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ExpirationPolicy">Expiration Policy</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the minimum amount of time that a dynamic configuration instance can remain idle before Mule considers it eligible for expiration. This does not mean that the platform expires the instance at the exact moment that it becomes eligible. Mule purges the instances as appropriate.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Connection Types

### Oauth 2 0 Connection Provider

Use OAuth 2.0 to delegate user authentication to the service hosting the user account. For more
information, refer to
[Configuring OAuth 2.0 for Connectors](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-oauth2) or
[Configuring OAuth 2.0 for Connectors on CloudHub](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-oauth2-cloudhub).

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Default Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#DefaultHeader">Default Header</a></p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#DefaultQueryParam">Default Query Param</a></p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for establishing connections to the remote service.</p></td><td><p>30</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Connection Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>SECONDS</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Use Persistent Connections</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>If false, each connection is closed after the first request is completed.</p></td><td><p>true</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Max Connections</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum number of outbound connections to keep open concurrently.</p></td><td><p>-1</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection Idle Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for how long a connection can remain idle before it is closed.</p></td><td><p>30</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection Idle Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit for the <strong>Connection Idle Timeout</strong> field.</p></td><td><p>SECONDS</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Proxy Config</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Proxy">Proxy</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Reusable configuration element for outbound connections through a proxy.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Stream Response</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether or not to stream received responses.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Buffer Size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The space, in bytes, for the buffer where the HTTP response is stored.</p></td><td><p>-1</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Protocol</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>HTTP</p></li><li><p>HTTPS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Protocol to use for communication. Valid values are HTTP and HTTPS.</p></td><td><p>HTTP</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>TLS Configuration</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Tls">TLS</a></p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Reconnection">Reconnection</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to true, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Consumer Key</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The OAuth consumer key as registered with the service provider.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Consumer Secret</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The OAuth consumer secret as registered with the service provider.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Authorization Url</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The service providerâs authorization endpoint URL</p></td><td><p>https://accounts.google.com/oauth2/auth/</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Access Token Url</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The service providerâs access token endpoint URL</p></td><td><p>https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Scopes</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>OAuth scopes to request during the dance.</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p>https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets</p></li><li><p>https://www.googleapis.com</p></li><li><p>/auth/drive.readonly</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Resource Owner Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Resource owner ID that each component should use if it isnât otherwise referenced.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Before</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of a flow to execute before starting the OAuth dance.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>After</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of a flow to execute after an access token is received.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Listener Config</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Reference to an &lt;http:listener-config /&gt; to use to create the listener that will catch the access token callback endpoint.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Callback Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Path of the access token callback endpoint.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Authorize Path</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Path of the local HTTP endpoint that triggers the OAuth dance.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>External Callback Url</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>If the callback endpoint is behind a proxy or should be accessed through an indirect URL, use this parameter to tell the OAuth provider the URL to use to access the callback.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Object Store</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Reference to the object store to use to store each resource owner IDâs data. If not specified, Mule runtime automatically provisions the default object store.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Sources

- [New Row](#NewRowListener)
- [New Spreadsheet](#NewSpreadsheetListener)
- [Updated Row](#UpdatedRowListener)

### New Row

`<google-sheets:new-row-listener>`

Listens for when a new row is added at the end of a sheet.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>30</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout time unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>SECONDS</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Primary Node Only</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Determines whether to execute this source on only the primary node when running in a cluster</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Scheduling Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><p>scheduling-strategy</p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the scheduler that triggers the polling</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Disables the repeatable stream functionality and uses non-repeatable streams to have less performance overhead, memory use, and cost</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Redelivery Policy</p></td><td><div><div><p>RedeliveryPolicy</p></div></div></td><td><p>Defines a policy for processing the redelivery of the same message</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Spreadsheet</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the spreadsheet</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the worksheet</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### New Spreadsheet

`<google-sheets:new-spreadsheet-listener>`

Listens for when a new spreadsheet is created in the Google Drive associated with the connection.
Google Sheets are not saved at the moment of creation; instead, they are saved the first time they
are edited. Adding a new spreadsheet wonât trigger a flow until after that spreadsheet is edited and
saved.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>30</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout time unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>SECONDS</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Primary Node Only</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Determines whether to execute this source on only the primary node when running in a cluster</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Scheduling Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><p>scheduling-strategy</p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the scheduler that triggers the polling</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Disables the repeatable stream functionality and uses non-repeatable streams to have less performance overhead, memory use, and cost</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Redelivery Policy</p></td><td><div><div><p>RedeliveryPolicy</p></div></div></td><td><p>Defines a policy for processing the redelivery of the same message</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Updated Row

`<google-sheets:updated-row-listener>`

Listens for when a row is created or updated in a sheet.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>30</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response timeout time unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>SECONDS</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Include Newly Added Rows</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates whether to include newly added rows in the output.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Primary Node Only</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Determines whether to execute this source on only the primary node when running in a cluster</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Scheduling Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><p>scheduling-strategy</p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the scheduler that triggers the polling</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Disables the repeatable stream functionality and uses non-repeatable streams to have less performance overhead, memory use, and cost</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Redelivery Policy</p></td><td><div><div><p>RedeliveryPolicy</p></div></div></td><td><p>Defines a policy for processing the redelivery of the same message</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Spreadsheet</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the spreadsheet</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Worksheet Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the worksheet</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

## Supported Operations

- [Append Spreadsheets Values](#CreateSpreadsheetsValuesRangeappendBySpreadsheetId)
- [List Drive Files](#GetFiles)
- [Get Spreadsheet Properties](#GetSpreadsheetsBySpreadsheetId)
- [Get Spreadsheets Values](#GetSpreadsheetsValuesBySpreadsheetIdRange)
- [Unauthorize](#Unauthorize)
- [Update Spreadsheets Values](#UpdateSpreadsheetsValuesBySpreadsheetIdRange)

## Operations

## Append Spreadsheets Values

`<google-sheets:create-spreadsheets-values-rangeappend-by-spreadsheet-id>`

Appends values to an existing spreadsheet, as determined by the specified range This operation makes
an HTTP POST request to the `/spreadsheets/{spreadsheetId}/values/{range}:append` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Spreadsheet</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the target spreadsheet.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Range</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>A1 notation of a range that determines where to start appending the values. The values are appended starting in the first column and after the last row in the specified range.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Value Input Option</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>USER_ENTERED</p></li><li><p>INPUT_VALUE_OPTION_UNSPECIFIED</p></li><li><p>RAW</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Indicates how to interpret the new content: INPUT_VALUE: Default input value. This value must not be used. RAW: Append the content as is, without parsing it. USER_ENTERED: Parse the values as if they were entered into the Google Sheets UI.</p></td><td><p>USER_ENTERED</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Insert Data Option</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>INSERT_ROWS</p></li><li><p>OVERWRITE</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Determines how existing data is changed when new data is input.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Type of content</p></td><td><p>application/json</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Spreadsheets Values Rangeappend Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to append</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryStream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreStream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Disables the repeatable stream functionality and uses non-repeatable streams to have less performance overhead, memory use, and cost.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO automatically defines the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- GOOGLE-SHEETS:BAD_REQUEST
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:CLIENT_ERROR
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:CONNECTIVITY
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:NOT_FOUND
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:SERVER_ERROR
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:TIMEOUT
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:UNAUTHORIZED
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## List Drive Files

`<google-sheets:get-files>`

Returns a list of the userâs Google Drive files. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
`/files` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Page Size</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Page size for the returned results</p></td><td><p>100</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Query</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Search query</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Fields</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Paths to the fields to include in the response. Use <code>*</code> to retrieve all fields.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Order By</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Order By</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Output Mime Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The MIME type of the payload that this operation outputs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryIterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreIterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Disables the repeatable stream functionality and uses non-repeatable streams to have less performance overhead, memory use, and cost</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Query Parameters</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom query parameters to include in the request. The specified query parameters are merged with the default query parameters that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td><p>#[null]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Custom Headers</p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom headers to include in the request. The specified custom headers are merged with the default headers that are specified in the configuration.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AUTO</p></li><li><p>ALWAYS</p></li><li><p>NEVER</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Defines if the request should be sent using streaming. Setting the value to AUTO automatically defines the best strategy based on the request content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Expression that evaluates the operationâs output. The expression outcome is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Config](#Config)

- GOOGLE-SHEETS:BAD_REQUEST
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:CLIENT_ERROR
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:CONNECTIVITY
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- GOOGLE-SHEETS:NOT_FOUND
